title: FIRE HARDENING GRANT PROGRAM - 211info
text: BUILDING CODES DIVISION FIRE HARDENING GRANT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a grant program for fire hardening (fire resistant) building improvements to eligible structures damaged or lost in a wildfire since 2020. The grant program has incentives up to $6,000 and will be open until Monday, December 30, 2025 8am-5pm. 1535 Edgewater Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: -Individuals whose home or business was lost or damaged in a wildfire since 2020 -Eligibility in the program will be determined by the applicant's county's building department, not by the Building Codes Division. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-4113 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 378-4133 Main phone (800) 442-7457 Toll-free Main phone (503) 378-4113 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit the web site and choose the county where the damaged home or business is located to access the application process and contact information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Douglas, Jackson, Klamath, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, and Marion Counties Services: Disaster Related Cash Grants Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - ENFORCEMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BUILDING CODES DIVISION
